news.headline: Europe struggles to respond to Trump's threat of tariffs unless they buy more U.S. energy. No strategy in place.
news.summary: The recently elected president has vowed to impose tariffs unless Europe increases its purchase of U.S. oil and gas. European authorities lack a defined plan to prevent a potential trade conflict.

news.headline: UK corporate chiefs reveal their wish list for government policy changes, including tax cuts and regulatory reforms.
Beijing Review highlights Macao SAR's growth in 25 years under Chinese President Xi Jinping's leadership on its 20th anniversary.
news.summary: On December 20, 2019, Chinese President Xi Jinping referenced an ancient proverb during his speech marking the 20th anniversary of Macao. He emphasized the importance of addressing all issues and fixing all flaws in governance. The event took place in Beijing.

news.headline: poLight ASA to showcase TWedge® Wobulator Pixel-Shifting on AR projectors at CES 2025 in collaboration with TI DLP® and Coretronic.
news.summary: A technology company in Tønsberg, Norway, poLight ASA, is set to showcase its newest TWedge® wobulator technology at CES 2025 in collaboration with TI DLP® and Coretronic for AR projectors. This demonstration highlights the innovative approach the company is taking towards advancing AR technology. The event will provide a platform for showcasing the capabilities of this technology to a wide audience, with expectations for high industry interest.

news.headline: Boliden's new Sustainability-Linked Finance Framework aims to support its goal of being a climate-friendly metal provider.
news.summary: In its quest to become the leading environmentally conscious metal provider globally, Boliden, headquartered in Stockholm, has unveiled a Sustainability-Linked Finance Framework on December 20, 2024. This framework aims to enable the issuance of Sustainability-Linked Bonds. This initiative underscores Boliden's commitment to sustainability and sets the stage for future investments in responsible practices.

news.headline: Whale support for Bitcoin seen at mid-$60K range, analyst warns BTC could hit new lows before rebounding from $95K peak.
news.summary: An analyst who accurately predicted BTC's surge to $95,000 has forecasted that the cryptocurrency's price will experience a decline leading to new long-term lows before bouncing back.

news.headline: Seed phrases are essential for accessing your funds. Store them securely in multiple safe locations to prevent unauthorized access.
news.summary: It is essential to securely store and back up your seed phrase in several secure locations to ensure that only you can access it when required.

news.headline: Currency Strength Chart: Strongest - JPY, EUR, NZD, CHF, AUD, CAD, USD, GBP- Weakest

Nike's new CEO criticizes promotions for profit decline, plans to clear excess inventory. Q2 revenue: $12.35B, beats $12.13B estim. Q2 earnings: 78 cents/share, beats 65 cents/share estim. Nike Direct revenue down 13%, Nike Brand revenue down 7%. CEO aims to refocus promotions and leverage Nike Value Stores. CNBC's Jim Cramer reacts to CEO's inventory statements.
news.summary: The new CEO of Nike, Elliott Hill, criticized his predecessor's strategies, stating that the company was not maximizing its strengths. Nike reported second-quarter revenue of $12.35 billion, surpassing analyst estimates of $12.13 billion. Earnings per share were 78 cents, beating estimates of 65 cents per share. Nike Direct revenues were $5 billion, down 13% year-over-year, and Nike Brand revenues were $12 billion, down 7%. Hill plans to focus on an integrated marketplace approach and reduce promotions while utilizing Nike Value Stores to manage excess inventory. CNBC's Jim Cramer commented on the CEO's statements regarding inventory levels.

news.headline: FPT's German subsidiary achieves 2024 EcoVadis Gold Rating, placing them in top 5% globally for sustainability practices.
news.summary: In HANOI, Vietnam, technology giant FPT has achieved the prestigious 2024 EcoVadis Gold Rating for its branch in Germany, placing it in the top 5% globally for sustainability. This acknowledgment highlights FPT's dedication to corporate responsibility and sustainable growth. EcoVadis, an esteemed sustainability evaluation platform, reviews companies in key areas such as the environment.

news.headline: Alphawave Semi launches industry’s first 64 Gbps UCIe Die-to-Die IP Subsystem, enabling >20 Tbps/mm bandwidth.
news.summary: Alphawave Semi has recently unveiled the industry’s inaugural 64 Gbps Universal Chiplet Interconnect Express (UCIe™) Die-to-Die (D2D) IP Subsystem, solidifying its stance as a leading provider of high-speed connectivity and compute silicon for global technology infrastructure. This cutting-edge solution sets a new benchmark for chiplet interconnect data rates, aiming to revolutionize ultra-high-performance D2D connectivity in the sector. The advanced 64 Gbps IP Subsystem, the third iteration of its kind, marks a significant leap forward in chiplet interconnect speeds.

news.headline: MemorialCare's Orange County locations, including 2 hospitals and medical group named 2024 Top Workplaces by The Orange County Register.
news.summary: In Fountain Valley, California, on December 20, 2024, MemorialCare's Orange County facilities - comprising two hospitals and a medical group - have been recognized as Top Workplaces for 2024 by The Orange County Register. This prestigious title underscores the health system's dedication to its employees and community.

news.headline: After 20 years, George Chaconas advises on the sale of Cox's Harley-Davidson in Rock Hill, SC, from Jan Cox to Carson Baker. Performance Brokerage Services announces this transaction.
news.summary: Leading dealership buy-sell facilitator, Performance Brokerage Services, recently facilitated the sale of Cox's Harley-Davidson in Rock Hill, South Carolina. The dealership was successfully sold from Jan Cox to Carson Baker. The transaction took place in Irvine, California, on December 20, 2024. Performance Brokerage Services continues to maintain its position as the top player in North America with the largest volume of such transactions.

news.headline: George C. Chaconas facilitated the sale of Infiniti of Melbourne in Florida from Kelly Auto Group to Jaime Vergara.
news.summary: Performance Brokerage Services, a prominent dealership buy-sell facilitator, disclosed the transaction involving the acquisition of Infiniti of Melbourne in Florida. The sale saw Kelly Auto Group transferring ownership to Jaime Vergara. The deal, finalized on December 20, 2024, marks a significant milestone for all parties involved. Performance Brokerage Services, recognized as North America's top broker in this domain, continues to play a pivotal role in facilitating such transactions, showcasing their dominance in the market.

news.headline: NHS England approves Evkeeza for eligible individuals aged 12+, available in 7 hospital trusts in England.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc. revealed that NHS England has initiated the commissioning of Evkeeza (evinacumab) in line with the final guidance from the National Institute for Health and Care Excellence (NICE) issued in September. This move allows for the routine use of Evkeeza in eligible individuals aged 12 years and above, and it will be accessible in seven hospital trusts across England. To facilitate access for children aged 5 to 11 years, prior approval forms have been established under the NHS England Commissioning Medicines for Children policy. Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc., a company concentrating on innovative therapies for rare genetic diseases, works to develop and commercialize these treatments.

news.headline: Renovation of Akropolis Klaipėda completed, with over 11,000 sqm upgraded common spaces. Investment of nearly EUR 8 million.
news.summary: The remodeling of communal areas in Akropolis Klaipėda, the primary shopping and entertainment hub in Western Lithuania, has been successfully finished. An extensive interior design overhaul and modernization initiative encompassed more than 11,000 square meters of communal spaces. Requiring a substantial financial commitment, the revamp of the shopping and entertainment center totaled nearly EUR 8 million.

French PPI YoY Actual -5.2% (Forecast -, Previous -5.7%)
Join Tineco at CES 2025 to discover new innovations in smart household appliances at Booth 51239, Venetian Expo, Halls A-D.
news.summary: Tineco, a prominent smart household appliances company, is showcasing its latest innovations at CES 2025 in Paris from January 7 to 10 at Venetian Expo, Halls A-D, Booth 51239. Over 14 million users worldwide are a part of its community, benefiting from groundbreaking cleaning solutions. The brand focuses on enhancing daily life through technology, presenting products that set new standards in home maintenance. One of the highlights at the Tineco booth is the debut of FLOOR O, reinforcing their commitment to innovation and user convenience.

news.headline: German Design Awards recognize TECNO PHANTOM V Fold2 5G & PHANTOM V Flip2 5G for "Excellent Product Design."
news.summary: In Hong Kong on December 20, 2024, TECNO, a renowned technology brand known for innovation worldwide, demonstrated its exceptional design capabilities by earning two notable "Excellent Product Design" accolades at the prestigious German Design Awards 2025. This recognition solidifies TECNO's position as a leader in the industry, highlighting its commitment to excellence and creativity.

news.headline: Traders on alert as rupee surpasses 85, scrutiny on RBI's response.
Bekaert provides update on share buyback program and liquidity agreement.
African CTOs face high risk without process mapping for digital transformation; BPX aids in optimization. Dhabi, Dec. 20, 2024 /PRNewswire.
news.summary: BPX, a specialist in business processes, aids African companies in safeguarding their investments in digital transformation initiatives by providing effective services for redesigning and optimizing business processes. This takes place in Dubai, UAE, as of December 20, 2024. The goal is to support enterprises amidst the swift progress of digital transformation, ensuring that their resources are utilized optimally.

news.headline: Quadient secures a $50M bank loan from Bank of America, bolstering its financial position.
New CFO appointed, responsible for managing company's finances. Key position overseeing budget of $50 million.
Equity concern rises with 50% increase in ownership stakes, sparking financial debates.
SPIE acquires 100% of AnyLinQ B.V. in Netherlands, expanding its presence in energy and communications services.
news.summary: On December 20th, 2024, SPIE, a prominent European provider of multi-technical services focusing on energy and communications, revealed the successful purchase of AnyLinQ B.V. in the Netherlands, acquiring the entirety of the company's shares.

news.headline: AS Delfi Meedia extends Management Board member Urmo Soonvald's powers until January 31, 2028 - the subsidiary of AS Ekspress Grupp.
news.summary: AS Delfi Meedia's Supervisory Board, a subsidiary of AS Ekspress Grupp, has approved the extension of Management Board member Urmo Soonvald's mandate until January 31, 2028.

news.headline: KPN will redeem €219.4 million Perpetual Fixed Rate Resettable Capital Securities issued in 2019.
news.summary: Today, Koninklijke KPN N.V. disclosed plans to redeem €219,400,000 in Perpetual Fixed Rate Resettable Capital Securities issued on 8 November 2019 (ISIN XS2069101868).

Tencent and Honor team up for broad AI and Cloud collaboration in a new partnership.

Winnebago Industries (NYSE: WGO) to report Q1 fiscal 2025 earnings on Dec 20. Expected EPS: 20 cents vs year-ago  $1.06, revenue: $672.23M vs $763M. Board approved dividend of 34 cents/share. Stock closed at $51.93, up 0.4%.
news.summary: Before the market open on Friday, Dec. 20, Winnebago Industries, Inc. (NYSE:WGO) is set to report its first quarter fiscal 2025 earnings. Analysts are anticipating earnings of 20 cents per share, a decline from $1.06 per share in the same period last year. The company is expected to disclose revenue of $672.23 million for the recent quarter, a decrease from $763 million in the prior year. Winnebago's Board of Directors recently approved a quarterly dividend of 34 cents per share. Closing at $51.93 on Thursday, Winnebago’s shares saw a 0.4% increase. For more details and analyst ratings, interested individuals can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Asset manager BlackRock's video raised concerns by suggesting changes to Bitcoin's 21 million supply cap are possible, sparking anxiety among Bitcoiners.
news.summary: BlackRock, the world's largest asset manager, caused a stir by including a disclaimer in a video disputing Bitcoin's fixed supply. The 3-minute video, shared by users like Michael Saylor, discussed Bitcoin's technical aspects and value proposition. When it addressed the fixed supply issue, a disclaimer appeared suggesting there was no assurance that Bitcoin's 21 million supply cap wouldn't change. This disclaimer triggered concerns among Bitcoin enthusiasts, with one user questioning its necessity. The incident led to raised eyebrows in the Bitcoin community.

news.headline: Paratus lists $500M senior secured bonds on Nordic ABM, confirmed in Dec 2024 announcement.
news.summary: In Bermuda on December 20, 2024, Paratus Energy Services Ltd. revealed the achievement stated in their June 5, 2024 announcement. The company, also known as Paratus, disclosed on their website the prosperous issuance of USD 500 million in new senior secured bonds.

news.headline: Italy's markets improving under Meloni, ending uncertainty. #Italy #Meloni #markets
GDIN celebrates success in 2024, supporting 122 companies with USD 246.6M in investments for overseas expansion.
news.summary: CEO Jongkap Kim proudly announced that the Global Digital Innovation Network (GDIN) has supported 122 companies in securing an impressive total of USD 246.6 million in investments for their overseas expansion endeavors. This successful initiative highlights the organization's commitment to facilitating the growth and development of businesses on a global scale.

news.headline: US House dismisses Trump-supported budget proposal, marking a significant setback for his administration.
Hyundai partners with TerraPower to develop equipment for SMRs, to manufacture reactor vessels for SFRs by 2030. SMRs promise safety and reduced nuclear waste.
news.summary: By 2030, TerraPower plans to finalize the construction of a cutting-edge 4th-generation Sodium Fast Reactor (SFR) in Wyoming, USA. Hyundai will be producing reactor vessels for these SFRs, drawing on their experience from the ITER project. SFRs are a type of Small Modular Reactor (SMR) celebrated for their elevated safety levels and decreased nuclear waste problems.

news.headline: Carnival Corp (NYSE:CCL) to release Q4 results on Dec 20. Analysts anticipate earnings of 7 cents/share with $5.93 billion revenue. Share price closed at $25.18, up 1.5%.
news.summary: Carnival Corporation (NYSE:CCL) is set to announce its fourth-quarter financial results on Friday, December 20th. Analysts anticipate earnings of 7 cents per share, a significant improvement from the previous year's loss of 7 cents per share. Revenue for the quarter is projected to be $5.93 billion compared to $5.4 billion in the same period last year. In the third quarter, Carnival reported adjusted earnings of $1.27 per share, surpassing analysts' expectations of $1.16 per share, with sales reaching $7.90 billion, slightly higher than the anticipated $7.83 billion. On Thursday, Carnival's stock closed at $25.18, marking a 1.5% increase. For more detailed analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page.

news.headline: Market sentiment declined, S&P 500, Nasdaq in red. Micron falls post sales miss. Dow Jones breaks multi-decade losing streak. Micron shares dip 16% after earnings. US economy grows annually.
news.summary: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index signalled a decrease in market sentiment, placing it in the “Extreme Fear” zone on Thursday. U.S. stocks had a mixed performance, with the Dow Jones index breaking its longest losing streak since 1974. Initially rallying, the 30-stock index surged over 460 points, but later lost some of those gains. Micron Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MU) saw a significant drop of more than 16% following better-than-expected earnings for its first quarter, but missed sales expectations. Additionally, the U.S. economy reported growth at an annualized rate. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Hanna-Leena Keskitalo appointed Aspocomp's HR Director, joining Management Team in Jan 2025, enhancing HR functions.
news.summary: Aspocomp Group Plc will be enhancing its Management Team starting January 20, 2025, with the appointment of Hanna-Leena Keskitalo as HR Director. Keskitalo, with a background in human resources management, is set to contribute to the company's growth with the increase in the number of employees over the past year. The Management Team, led by CEO Manu Skyttä, now includes Keskitalo, along with President and CEO Manu Skyttä, CCO and Deputy CEO Antti Ojala, COO Pekka Holopainen, CFO Jouni Kinnunen, and CTO Mitri Mattila. Aspocomp specializes in providing PCB technology services to companies worldwide, particularly in telecommunication, automotive, industrial electronics, and security technologies, with its main operations in Espoo and Oulu, Finland. For more information, contact CEO Manu Skyttä at +358 20 775 6860 or manu.skytta(at)aspocomp.com.

news.headline: Stocks to watch: FedEx, Nike. Carnival expected to earn 8 cents per share on $5.93 billion revenue. Nike reports $12.35 billion revenue.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures were down this morning, prompting investor focus on certain stocks today:- Carnival Corporation & Plc. (NYSE:CCL) is expected to announce earnings of 8 cents per share and revenue of $5.93 billion before the opening bell. After-hours trading saw Carnival's shares increase by 0.4% to $25.27.- NIKE, Inc. (NYSE:NKE) released second-quarter financial results that surpassed expectations post closing bell on Thursday. The company reported revenue of $12.35 billion for the second quarter, outperforming analyst predictions. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.
